sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after shifting bottom row left by 2
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Get all 2x2 squares
squares = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 4:
        b = n['boundary']
        top_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
        left_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
        squares.append((top_row, left_col, n['color']))

# Sort and print
squares.sort()
print("=== Current 2x2 squares ===")
for r, c, color in squares:
    print(f"  ({r:2d}, {c:2d}): {color}")

# Check col 35 squares
print("\n=== Col 35 squares ===")
for r, c, color in squares:
    if c == 35:
        print(f"  ({r}, {c}): {color}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
